resources.string: Always stay updated on the weather!
Get precise, timely weather forecast anywhere.\nEasily plan your week\nwith our 7-day forecast
Stay ahead of the weather with hourly updates\nfor safety and comfort
Weather under control \n- every day, every hour
Enter the name of a city
No Internet Connection\nThe weather forecast data may be outdated
Failed to connect to the internet
The weather forecast data successfully updated
Please enter the name of the city to get the weather forecast
Failed to retrieve the weather forecast. Please check the data you entered and your internet connection
Location access denied.\nEnter the name of the city manually
Before you start using the app, please familiarize yourself with our
I accept Privacy Policy & Terms of Use

Thank you for using the AtmoSphere app! We are committed to protecting your personal information and privacy. This Privacy Policy outlines how we collect, use, process, and protect the information of our app users.
When using AtmoSphere, we may collect the following data:
Geolocation Data: to provide accurate weather forecasts. Usage Data: to improve app functionality and interface..
The collected information is used to:\nProvide and enhance the weather forecast service.\nConduct research and analysis to improve the app.
We do not sell, trade, or transfer your personal data to third parties
We take measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction
We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Policy on this page
If you have any questions about our Privacy Policy, please contact us at kanatbayalbayev@gmail.com

Welcome to the AtmoSphere app! These Terms of Use govern your access to and use of our weather forecast application. By using the AtmoSphere app, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree with the Terms, please do not use the app.
AtmoSphere app provides weather forecasts and related data. We strive for accuracy but cannot guarantee 100% precision of the information provided.Its use is at your own risk.
All rights, including copyrights and trademarks of the AtmoSphere app, belong to us or our licensors. All materials contained in the app are protected by copyright.
You agree not to use the AtmoSphere app for illegal activities, not to copy or modify the app, its content, or functionality.
We are not liable for any direct or indirect losses resulting from the use or inability to use the app.
6. Changes to the Terms of Use
We reserve the right to change these Terms at any time. Your continued use of the app following such changes will indicate your agreement with the new Terms.
If you have any questions about our Terms of Use, please contact us at kanatbayalbayev@gmail.com.
